title: School bands; expenses
doc_html:
§81.3.  School bands; expenses

The parish and city school boards of the state may pay the expenses incurred by high school bands when such bands have earned the privilege of participating in special events or festivals and do in fact participate therein.  

Added by Acts 1978, No. 779, §1.
